payload.description:
Perform full re-clustering over all indexed documents, producing stable cluster assignments with centroids, boundary distances, and LLM-generated labels. Reuses BERTopic patterns from `plexus/analysis/topics/analyzer.py` but operates on **pre-computed embeddings** rather than raw text.

The key architectural change from existing `TopicAnalysis` is decoupling: the `TopicClusterer` receives embeddings that were already computed (and cached) by Epic 2, then runs only UMAP + HDBSCAN + c-TF-IDF.

## Definition of Done

- `TopicClusterer` class in `plexus/analysis/topic_clusterer.py`
- Clusters from pre-computed 384-dim embeddings via BERTopic
- Computes centroids (mean of member embeddings) per cluster
- Computes p95 distance boundaries per cluster
- Generates human-readable labels via LLM (mocked in tests)
- Cluster records persisted to OpenSearch as special documents with `record_type: cluster`
- All scenarios in child stories pass

## Depends On

- Epic plx-46f6f0 (Embedding Cache) — for embedding format
- Epic plx-493fd8 (OpenSearch Client) — for persistence

## Key Files

- Create: `plexus/analysis/topic_clusterer.py`
- Create: `plexus/analysis/topic_clusterer_test.py`
- Modify: `plexus/analysis/opensearch_client.py` (cluster record methods)
- Reuse patterns from: `plexus/analysis/topics/analyzer.py` (UMAP lines 524-534, BERTopic lines 738-746)
payload.title: Global Clustering Engine
